fixes.origin:
script = (
    "UPDATE moderation_batches SET reviewer = '"
    + reviewer
    + "', notes = '"
    + notes
    + "', updated_at = '"
    + datetime.utcnow().isoformat()
    + "' WHERE batch_id = '"
    + batch_id
    + "';"
)
cursor.executescript(script)
connection.commit()
fixes.replacement:
cursor.execute(
    "UPDATE moderation_batches SET reviewer = ?, notes = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE batch_id = ?",
    (reviewer, notes, datetime.utcnow().isoformat(), batch_id),
)
connection.commit()
